member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAutoSizeMode
member.summary: Defines constant that specify how the PopupView is Sized.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAutoSizeMode.Width
member.summary: PopupView's width will be automatically adjusted based on the contents of its template.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAutoSizeMode.Height
member.summary: PopupView's height will be automatically adjusted based on the contents of its template.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAutoSizeMode.Both
member.summary: PopupView's width and height will be automatically adjusted based on the contents of its template.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAutoSizeMode.None
member.summary: PopupView's size will not be determined by the contents of its template. This is the default value.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAutoSizeTarget
member.summary: Defines constants that specify which part of the PopupView should be auto-sized.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAutoSizeTarget.Content
member.summary: Only the content area of the PopupView will be auto-sized. The header and footer will retain predefined sizes.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAutoSizeTarget.Header
member.summary: Only the header of the PopupView will be auto-sized. The content and footer will retain predefined sizes.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAutoSizeTarget.Footer
member.summary: Only the footer of the PopupView will be auto-sized. The content and header will retain predefined sizes.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAutoSizeTarget.All
member.summary: The entire PopupView including header, content, and footer will be auto-sized.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupButtonAppearanceMode
member.summary: Built-in layout styles of the PopupView.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupButtonAppearanceMode.OneButton
member.summary: A layout with one button in the footer.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupButtonAppearanceMode.TwoButton
member.summary: A layout with two buttons in the footer.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupBlurIntensity
member.summary: Defines constants that specifies the intensity of the blur effect applied to the overlay.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupBlurIntensity.Light
member.summary: Specifies that a light blur effect will be used for the overlay.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupBlurIntensity.ExtraLight
member.summary: Specifies that a very light blur effect will be used for the overlay.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupBlurIntensity.ExtraDark
member.summary: Specifies a very dark blur effect intensity for the overlay.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupBlurIntensity.Dark
member.summary: Specifies a dark blur effect intensity for the overlay.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupBlurIntensity.Custom
member.summary: Specifies that the overlay’s blur effect intensity will be a custom float value set in .

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupOverlayMode
member.summary: Defines constants that specifies whether the overlay should be transparent or blurred.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupOverlayMode.Transparent
member.summary: Specifies that the overlay will be transparent with opacity applied based on value of alpha.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupOverlayMode.Blur
member.summary: Specifies that the overlay will be blurred based on the intensity of .

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupRelativePosition
member.summary: Positions the popup view relative to the given view.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupRelativePosition.AlignTop
member.summary: Displays the popup at the top of the given view.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupRelativePosition.AlignToLeftOf
member.summary: Displays the popup to the left of the given view.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupRelativePosition.AlignToRightOf
member.summary: Displays the popup to the right of the given view.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupRelativePosition.AlignBottom
member.summary: Displays the popup at the bottom of the given view.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupRelativePosition.AlignTopLeft
member.summary: Displays the popup at the top left position of the given view.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupRelativePosition.AlignTopRight
member.summary: Displays the popup at the top right position of the given view.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupRelativePosition.AlignBottomLeft
member.summary: Displays the popup at the bottom left position of the given view.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupRelativePosition.AlignBottomRight
member.summary: Displays the popup at the bottom right position of the given view.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationEasing
member.summary: Defines constants that specifies the built-in animation easing effects available in when opening and closing the popup.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationEasing.SinIn
member.summary: This easing function will smoothly accelerate the animation to its final value.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationEasing.SinOut
member.summary: This easing function will smoothly decelerate the animation to its final value.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationEasing.SinInOut
member.summary: This easing function will smoothly accelerate the animation at the beginning and then smoothly decelerates the animation at the end.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationEasing.Linear
member.summary: This easing function will use a constant velocity to animate the view and is the default type.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationMode
member.summary: Built-in animations available in , which is applied when the PopupView opens and closes in the screen.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationMode.Zoom
member.summary: zoom-out animation will be applied when the PopupView opens and zoom-in animation will be applied when the PopupView closes.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationMode.Fade
member.summary: Fade-out animation will be applied when the PopupView opens and Fade-in animation will be applied when the PopupView closes.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationMode.SlideOnLeft
member.summary: PopupView will be animated from left-to-right, when it opens and it will be animated from right-to-left when the PopupView closes.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationMode.SlideOnRight
member.summary: PopupView will be animated from right-to-left, when it opens and it will be animated from left-to-right when the PopupView closes.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationMode.SlideOnTop
member.summary: PopupView will be animated from top-to-bottom, when it opens and it will be animated from bottom-to-top when the PopupView closes.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationMode.SlideOnBottom
member.summary: PopupView will be animated from bottom-to-top, when it opens and it will be animated from top-to-bottom when the PopupView closes.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupAnimationMode.None
member.summary: Animation will not be applied.

member.summary: This event will be fired whenever the is opening in the view. Occurring of this event can be cancelled based on conditions.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.PositionChanging
member.summary: Occurs before the popup position changes.
member.remarks: This event is raised prior to updating the popup's position. To modify the position, set and ensure is true. If Handled is not set to true, the popup will retain its original position.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.IsOpen
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the is open or not.
member.value: The value indicating whether the is open or not.
member.remarks: The will be opened and closed based on this value.

example.para: The following code example demonstrates how to set IsOpen property for the control.
example.code: <?xml version = "1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <ContentPage xmlns = "http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml" xmlns:syncfusion="clr-namespace:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup;assembly=Syncfusion.Maui.Popup" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:PopupMAUI" x:Class="PopupMAUI.MainPage"> <ContentPage.BindingContext> <local:ViewModel/> </ContentPage.BindingContext> <ContentPage.Content> <StackLayout WidthRequest = "500" > <syncfusion:SfPopup x:Name="popup" IsOpen="{Binding IsOpen}"/> <Button x:Name="clickToShowPopup" Text="Click To Show Popup" Clicked="clickToShowPopup_Clicked"/> </StackLayout> </ContentPage.Content> </ContentPage>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.OverlayMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether overlay should be transparent or blurred.
member.value: OverlayMode.Blur If the overlay should be blurred otherwiseOverlayMode.Transparent.The default value is OverlayMode.Transparent.
member.remarks: OverlayMode.Blur will be applied to android 31 and above. In below android 31, OverlayMode.Transparent will be applied by default.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.RelativePosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the relative position, where the pop-up should be displayed relatively to . The relative position can also be absolutely adjusted using the and properties.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.AbsoluteX
member.summary: Gets or sets the absolute x-point to display a pop-up when positioning it relatively to the specified based on the . The pop-up will be displayed based on this property value only when relatively displaying it by using the property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.AbsoluteY
member.summary: Gets or sets the absolute y-point to display a pop-up when positioning it relatively to the specified based on the . The pop-up will be displayed based on this property value only when relatively displaying it by using the property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.RelativeView
member.summary: Gets or sets the view relative to which the popup should be displayed based on the . The relative position can also be absolutely adjusted using the and properties.

example.para: The following code example demonstrates how to set RelativeView property for the control.
example.code: <?xml version = "1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <ContentPage xmlns = "http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml" xmlns:syncfusion="clr-namespace:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup;assembly=Syncfusion.Maui.Popup" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:PopupMAUI" x:Class="PopupMAUI.MainPage"> <ContentPage.BindingContext> <local:ViewModel/> </ContentPage.BindingContext> <ContentPage.Content> <StackLayout WidthRequest = "500" > <Button x:Name="setRelativeView" Text="Set Relative" /> <syncfusion:SfPopup x:Name="popup" AbsoluteX="10" AbsoluteY="10" RelativeView="{x:Reference setRelativeView}" RelativePosition="AlignBottom" IsOpen="{Binding IsOpen}"/> <Button x:Name="clickToShowPopup" Text="Click To Show Popup" Clicked="clickToShowPopup_Clicked"/> </StackLayout> </ContentPage.Content> </ContentPage>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.StaysOpen
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the should be opened, when interacting outside its boundary area.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.ShowOverlayAlways
member.summary: Gets or Sets a value indicating whether an overlay can be shown around the .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.AppearanceMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of layout template of the PopupView.
member.value: PopupButtonAppearanceMode.OneButton displays a single button in the PopupView footer. PopupButtonAppearanceMode.TwoButton displays two buttons in the PopupView footer.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.HeaderTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the template to be loaded in the header of the PopupView.
member.remarks: does not apply to templated elements.

example.para: The following code example demonstrates how to set HeaderTemplate property for the control.
example.code: <?xml version = "1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <ContentPage xmlns = "http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml" xmlns:syncfusion="clr-namespace:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup;assembly=Syncfusion.Maui.Popup" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:PopupMAUI" x:Class="PopupMAUI.MainPage"> <ContentPage.BindingContext> <local:ViewModel/> </ContentPage.BindingContext> <ContentPage.Content> <StackLayout WidthRequest = "500" > <Button x:Name="setRelativeView" Text="Set Relative" /> <syncfusion:SfPopup x:Name="popup" IsOpen="{Binding IsOpen}"> <syncfusion:SfPopup.HeaderTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Label Text = "Customized Header" FontAttributes="Bold" BackgroundColor="Blue" FontSize="16" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" VerticalTextAlignment="Center"/> </DataTemplate> </syncfusion:SfPopup.HeaderTemplate> </syncfusion:SfPopup> <Button x:Name="clickToShowPopup" Text="Click To Show Popup" Clicked="clickToShowPopup_Clicked"/> </StackLayout> </ContentPage.Content> </ContentPage>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.ContentTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the template to be loaded in the body of the PopupView.
member.remarks: does not apply to templated elements.

example.para: The following code example demonstrates how to set ContentTemplate property for the control.
example.code: <?xml version = "1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <ContentPage xmlns = "http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml" xmlns:syncfusion="clr-namespace:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup;assembly=Syncfusion.Maui.Popup" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:PopupMAUI" x:Class="PopupMAUI.MainPage"> <ContentPage.BindingContext> <local:ViewModel/> </ContentPage.BindingContext> <ContentPage.Content> <StackLayout WidthRequest = "500" > <Button x:Name="setRelativeView" Text="Set Relative" /> <syncfusion:SfPopup x:Name="popup" IsOpen="{Binding IsOpen}"> <syncfusion:SfPopup.ContentTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Label Text = "This is SfPopup" BackgroundColor="SkyBlue" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center"/> </DataTemplate> </syncfusion:SfPopup.ContentTemplate> </syncfusion:SfPopup> <Button x:Name="clickToShowPopup" Text="Click To Show Popup" Clicked="clickToShowPopup_Clicked"/> </StackLayout> </ContentPage.Content> </ContentPage>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.FooterTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the template to be loaded in the footer of the PopupView.
member.remarks: does not apply to templated elements. need to be enabled to display footer.

example.para: The following code example demonstrates how to set FooterTemplate property for the control.
example.code: <?xml version = "1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <ContentPage xmlns = "http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml" xmlns:syncfusion="clr-namespace:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup;assembly=Syncfusion.Maui.Popup" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:PopupMAUI" x:Class="PopupMAUI.MainPage"> <ContentPage.BindingContext> <local:ViewModel/> </ContentPage.BindingContext> <ContentPage.Content> <StackLayout WidthRequest = "500" > <Button x:Name="setRelativeView" Text="Set Relative" /> <syncfusion:SfPopup x:Name="popup" IsOpen="{Binding IsOpen}" ShowFooter="True"> <syncfusion:SfPopup.FooterTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Label Text = "Customized Footer" FontAttributes="Bold" BackgroundColor="Blue" FontSize="16" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" VerticalTextAlignment="Center"/> </DataTemplate> </syncfusion:SfPopup.FooterTemplate> </syncfusion:SfPopup> <Button x:Name="clickToShowPopup" Text="Click To Show Popup" Clicked="clickToShowPopup_Clicked"/> </StackLayout> </ContentPage.Content> </ContentPage>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.AutoSizeMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines how to size the PopupView based on its template contents.
member.value: The default value is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.AutoSizeTarget
member.summary: Gets or sets which part of the popup participates in automatic sizing.
member.value: The default value is .
member.remarks:
Multiple targets can be combined using bitwise OR (e.g., Header | Footer) to auto-size specific sections.
Behavior: : Includes the header, content, and footer in auto-size calculations. Header is included only when is not null and the header is shown. Content is included only when is not null. Footer is included only when is not null and the footer is shown. : Only the content participates in auto-size calculations, header and footer are ignored even if templates are provided. : Only the header participates in auto-size calculations, content and footer are ignored even if templates are provided. : Only the footer participates in auto-size calculations, header and content are ignored even if templates are provided.
Notes: The dimensions (width/height/both/none) that will auto-size are controlled by . If no applicable template is present for the selected target, the control falls back to explicit requests (e.g., , ) and defaults.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.AnimationMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the animation to be applied for the PopupView when opening and closing it.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.AnimationDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration in milliseconds of the animation played when opening and closing the PopupView.
member.value: The duration in milliseconds of the animation played at the opening and closing of the PopupView.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.AnimationEasing
member.summary: Gets or sets the animation easing effect to be applied to the PopupView's opening and closing animation.
member.value: The animation easing effect to be applied for the PopupView when it opens and closes.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.IgnoreActionBar
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the action bar bounds should be considered while positioning the Popup.
member.value: true to consider the action bar area to position the Popup. otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.SfPopup.CanLayoutForGivenSizeAndPosition
member.summary: Checks whether the layout of the popup view is made for the given size and position.
member.returns: True, if popup layout for given size and position. False otherwise.
member.remarks: If the layout is made for the given size and position, PopupView will not be layout for the full view of the application. Hence in this case, the calculations must be made for the instead of the PopupView. In order to check whether the calculations must be made either to the PopupView or Container, this case is checked.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupStyle.OverlayColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the overlay color when PopupView is displayed.
member.remarks: Opacity of the can be customized using Alpha value.

example.para: The following code example demonstrates how to apply opacity with .
example.code: <?xml version = "1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <ContentPage xmlns = "http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml" xmlns:syncfusion="clr-namespace:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup;assembly=Syncfusion.Maui.Popup" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:PopupMAUI" x:Class="PopupMAUI.MainPage"> <ContentPage.BindingContext> <local:ViewModel/> </ContentPage.BindingContext> <ContentPage.Content> <StackLayout WidthRequest = "500" > <syncfusion:SfPopup x:Name="popup" IsOpen="{Binding IsOpen}"> <syncfusion:SfPopup.PopupStyle> <syncfusion:PopupStyle OverlayColor="rgba(0,0,0,0.5)"/> </syncfusion:SfPopup.PopupStyle> </syncfusion:SfPopup> <Button x:Name="clickToShowPopup" Text="Click To Show Popup" Clicked="clickToShowPopup_Clicked"/> </StackLayout> </ContentPage.Content> </ContentPage>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Popup.PopupStyle.CornerRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets the corner radius for the .
member.remarks: On Android 33 and above, it is possible to set different corner radii for each corner using the class. However, on versions below Android 33, if the same value is provided for all corners, a corner radius will be applied. If different values are provided for each corner, the corner radius may not be applied.
